title: MPESB Notification 2026 - Apply Online for 1200 Hospital Assistant Posts
description: The Madhya Pradesh Employees Selection Board (MPESB) has officially released the notification to fill the vacancies of 1200 Hospital Assistant Posts. Interested and eligibile candidates can use this opportunity to apply for these posts before the last date of application. Candidates who have completed their 10th can apply for the MPESB Notification 2026 . The interested applicants can apply in online mode. Here we have mentioned the education details, age limit, selection process, application...
